ideation: This animation sequence simulates a snake slithering motion using the robot arms.  The arms will move in a wave-like pattern, mimicking the sinuous movement of a snake.  The lack of elbows will require creative use of the shoulder joints to create the illusion of a flowing movement.  I'll focus on creating distinct keyframes that emphasize the undulation of the snake's body. The left arm will lead the movement, while the right arm follows in a slightly delayed manner, creating a sense of continuous motion.  The wrists will remain relatively neutral to avoid unnecessary complexity and to maintain a focus on the arm's movement. I’ll use the examples of waving or party popper animations for inspiration, adapting their fluid and alternating motions to simulate the slithering movement of a snake.

frames.beat: arms snake out in opposite directions, low slither
arms cross and undulate inward, a ripple effect
arms extend outward again, a sinuous twist
arms return to a neutral, resting slither
